volumeHelp: Tobetsa go bona bara ya modumo
volumeSliderClosed: Bara ya bolumu e e tswetsweng
statusUsingDesc: Go dirisa mofuta o o tlhalosiwang wa modumo
statusLoadingDesc: Go laisa mofuta o o nang le tlhaloso ya modumo
statusUsingNoDesc: Go dirisa mofuta o o senang tlhaloso ya modumo
statusLoadingNoDesc: Go laisa mofuta kwantle ga tlhaloso ya modumo
statusLoadingNext: Go laisa pina e e latelang
alertDescribedVersion: Go dirisa mofuta wa bidio e e tlhalosiwang ka modumo
alertNonDescribedVersion: Go dirisa mofuta o o senang tlhaloso ya modumo wa bidio
fallbackError1: Sebatli sa gago ga se tshegediwe
fallbackError2: Dibatli tse di latelang di tsamaisana le setshamekisi seno
prefTitleCaptions: Ditlhopho tsa mafoko a a kwa tlase
prefIntroCaptions: Dikgatlhegelo tse di latelang di laola kafa ditlhaloso di tlhagisiwang ka gone.
prefIntroDescription1: Setshamekisi seno se tshegetsa tlhaloso ya modumo ka ditsela tse pedi:
prefIntroDescription2: Bidio ya ga jaana e na le
prefIntroDescriptionNone: Video ya ga jaana ga e na tlhaloso ya modumo ka fomete epe.
prefIntroDescription3: Dirisa foromo e e fa tlase go seta ditlhopho tsa gago tsa tlhaloso ya modumo mo sekwalong.
prefIntroDescription4: Morago ga go boloka dipeakanyo, o ka tobetsa kgotsa wa tima tlhaloso ya modumo ka konopo e e tshwanang.
prefIntroKeyboard1: Setshamekisi se se mo tsebeng eno se ka dirisiwa go tswa gongwe le gongwe o dirisa dikgaoganyo tsa khiiboto (bona lenaane le le fa tlase).
prefIntroKeyboard2: O ka tlhalosa dikonopo tsa phetolo (Alt, Taolo le/kgotsa Shift).
prefIntroKeyboard3: ELA TLHOKO: Dikopano dingwe tsa dikonopo di ka nna tsa thulana le tse di dirisiwang ke sebatli sa gago le/kgotsa ditiriso tse dingwe. Leka dikopano tse di farologaneng le dikonopo tsa phetolo go fitlha o bona tse di go siametseng.
prefIntroTranscript: Dikgatlhego tse di latelang di ama go kwalololwa ga tirisano.
prefCookieWarning: Go boloka ditlhopho tsa gago go tlhokega gore o dirise dikhuki.
prefHeadingKeyboard1: Dikonopo tsa sefetoledi tse di dirisiwang jaaka dikgaoganyo tsa khiiboto
prefHeadingKeyboard2: Dikgaoganyo tsa ga jaana tsa khiiboto
escapeKeyFunction: Tswala puisano ya ga jaana kgotsa popup
prefDescFormatHelp: Fa difomete tseno ka bobedi di le teng, go tla dirisiwa e le nngwe fela ya tsone.
prefDescFormatOption1: Video e nngwe e e nang le tlhaloso ya modumo e e tsenngwang (e e gatisitsweng pele).
prefDescFormatOption1b: mofuta o mongwe o o nang le tlhaloso ya modumo
prefDescFormatOption2: Tlhaloso ya mafoko e e buisiwang ke sebuisi sa sekerini (TTS)
prefDescPause: Emisa bidio ka go itirisa fa tlhaloso e simolola
prefDescVisible: Bontsha tlhaloso mo sekwalong fa e kgontshitswe
prefDescPitch3: E tlhomamisitswe go sa le gale
sampleDescriptionText: Fetola diseting tsa gago gore o utlwe mokwalo ono wa sekao.
prefHighlight: Tlhagisa se se kwalolotsweng fa diteng di ntse di tswelela
prefTabbable: Kwalololo e e Dirisiwang ya Khiiboto
prefNoChange: Ga go ise go dirwe diphetogo dipe.
transcriptControls: Ditaolo tsa Lefensetere la go Kwalolola
signControls: Ditaolo tsa Difensetere tsa Puo ya Diatla
windowMoveAlert: Goga kgotsa dirisa dikonopo tsa motsu go tsamaisa fensetere; Tobetsa Tsenya go emisa.
windowSendBackAlert: Lefensetere le ga le ka fa morago ga selo sepe.
windowBringTopAlert: Jaanong fensetere eno e fa pele ga dilo tse dingwe tsotlhe mo tsebeng.
resultsSummary4: Tobetsa nako e e amanang le ntlha epe fela go tshameka bidio go tswa mo ntlheng eo.
noResultsFound: Ga go na dipholo tse di bonweng.
aboutTitle: Ka ga Motshameki yo o Kgonang
productNameWeb: Motshameki yo o Kgonang TOTHOM Kgatiso ya Webo
productNameWp: Motshameki yo o Kgonang TOTHOM wa WordPress
copyrightSuffix: Webo ya TOTHOM. Ditshwanelo tsotlhe di beilwe.
webEditionDescription: Kgatiso e e rulagantsweng le e e atolositsweng ya sebapadi sa metswedi ya dikgang se se fitlhelesegang Able Player. Diphetolo le ditiro tse dingwe tse di tlhamilweng ke TOTHOMweb ke dirweboleta tsa mong.
wpEditionDescription: WordPress plugin e eketsa widget ho Elementor, e etseditsweng ho kopanya kgatiso e hlophisitsweng le e atolositsweng ya sebapali sa mecha ya ditaba se fihlellwang Able Player. Diphetolo le ditiro tse dingwe tse di tlhamilweng ke TOTHOMweb ke dirweboleta tsa mong.
thirdPartyDescription: Sediriswa seno se akaretsa serweboleta se se latelang sa motswedi o o bulegileng:
ablePlayerCopyright: © 2014-2025 Batsayakarolo ba Motshameki yo o Kgoneng
distributedUnder: E anamisiwa ka fa tlase ga melawana ya
